recommendations.title: Stolen Girl
recommendations.overview: In 1993, Maureen’s six-year-old daughter Amina is snuck out of the country by her ex-husband, Karim. After years of unsuccessful attempts to find her, Maureen intersects with a professional retriever of internationally abducted children who promises

recommendations.title: A Violent Separation
recommendations.overview: 1983. In a quiet Midwestern town, a young deputy covers up a murder at the hands of his brother triggering a series of events that sends them and the victim's family towards a shattering climax.

recommendations.title: Cyberbully
recommendations.overview: A woman tries to help her teenage daughter when she becomes the victim of online bullying.

recommendations.title: Damage
recommendations.overview: An ex-con battles it out in the cage to pay for the operation that would save the daughter of his victim. Along the way he finds fatherly love, and friendship, in the most unlikely of places.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Red Right Hand
recommendations.overview: Cash is trying to live a quiet, honest life in a small Appalachian town. When a vicious crime boss forces him back into her services, he soon learns he's capable of anything -- even killing -- to protect his family and his home.

recommendations.title: The Aura
recommendations.overview: A quiet, epileptic taxidermist plans the perfect crime. All he needs is the right opportunity. An accident, perhaps…

recommendations.title: The Wrath of Becky
recommendations.overview: Two years after she escaped a violent attack on her family, 16-year-old Becky attempts to rebuild her life in the care of an older woman -- a kindred spirit named Elena. However, when a violent group known as the Noble Men break into their home, atta

recommendations.title: The Crow: City of Angels
recommendations.overview: A murder victim is brought back to life by a mysterious crow. With the help of a beautiful woman, he exacts revenge on his killers – only to realize his enemy has discovered the one weakness that can destroy him forever.

recommendations.title: The Fury of a Patient Man
recommendations.overview: Quiet Jose woos cafe worker Ana, but she is unaware he has intentions other than the purely romantic.
